title: AES Indiana joins National Electric Highway Coalition
text: A commitment to support electric vehicle growth INDIANAPOLIS , March 22, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- AES Indiana, a subsidiary of The AES Corporation (NYSE:AES), has joined the National Electric Highway Coalition (NEHC), a collaboration of electric companies organized around the common goal of deploying electric vehicle (EV) fast charging infrastructure to support the growing number of EVs and to help ensure that the transition to EVs is seamless for drivers. In 2021, the Edison Electric Institute (EEI) along with an initial group of member companies led efforts to support the clean energy transformation and reduce carbon emissions across our economy.

title: AES Ohio joins National Electric Highway Coalition
text: A commitment to support electric vehicle growth DAYTON, Ohio, March 22, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- AES Ohio, a subsidiary of The AES Corporation (NYSE:AES), has joined the National Electric Highway Coalition (NEHC), a collaboration of electric companies organized around the common goal of deploying electric vehicle (EV) fast charging infrastructure to support the growing number of EVs and to help ensure the transition to EVs is seamless for drivers. In 2021, the Edison Electric Institute (EEI) along with an initial group of member companies led efforts to support the clean energy transformation and reduce carbon emissions across our economy.

title: Ameren: Long Growth Pipeline And Reasonable Valuation Create Investment Opportunity
text: Ameren is a fairly large electric and natural gas utility serving customers in Missouri and Illinois.

title: AES Named to List of World's Most Ethical Companies for the Ninth Year
text: AES is one of only nine in the energy and utilities sector to be recognized for its integrity and high standards in ethical business practices  ARLINGTON, Va., March 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The AES Corporation (NYSE: AES) has been named one of the World's Most Ethical Companies for the ninth consecutive year by Ethisphere Institute , a global leader in defining and advancing the standards of ethical business practices.

title: AES Corporation: This Highly Leveraged Utility Might Have Potential
text: AES is one of the largest utilities in the world, with operations in fifteen different countries. It is mostly focused on the USA, though.

title: AES Appoints Susan Harcourt Vice President of Investor Relations; Names Ahmed Pasha CFO of US Utilities & Conventional Generation
text: ARLINGTON, Va., March 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The AES Corporation (NYSE: AES) announced today the appointment of Susan Harcourt as Vice President of Investor Relations, succeeding Ahmed Pasha who has been named Chief Financial Officer of the Company's US Utilities and Conventional Generation.

title: AES Named to Fast Company's 2022 World's Most Innovative Companies List
text: ARLINGTON, Va., March 8, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, The AES Corporation (NYSE: AES) was named to Fast Company's 2022 list of the World's Most Innovative Companies.

title: 17 Fair Priced 2022 Best Bet Dividends Beckon In March
text: Back in November-December 2021, Kiplinger and Barron's reporters combined to list ten sets of stocks sorted as best-bets for 2022. Those ten "Best-Bets" articles revealed 123 equities, with 88 paying dividends.
